mapper.select: SELECT * FROM places WHERE is_active = 1 AND latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL

SELECT * FROM places WHERE is_active = 1 AND latitude IS NOT NULL
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO places ( id, name, category, original_category_code, address, latitude, longitude, tour_api_id, content_type_id, operating_hours, description, image_url, is_active, synced_at ) VALUES ( UUID(), #{name}, #{category}, #{originalCategoryCode}, #{address}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{tourApiId}, #{contentTypeId}, #{operatingHours}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, 1, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), category = VALUES(category), address = VALUES(address), latitude = VALUES(latitude), longitude = VALUES(longitude), operating_hours = VALUES(operating_hours), description = VALUES(description), image_url = VALUES(image_url), synced_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT *, ( 6371 * 2 * ASIN(SQRT( POWER(SIN(RADIANS(latitude - #{lat}) / 2), 2) + COS(RADIANS(#{lat})) * COS(RADIANS(latitude)) * POWER(SIN(RADIANS(longitude - #{lng}) / 2), 2) )) ) AS distance_km FROM places WHERE is_active = 1 AND latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL AND ( 6371 * 2 * ASIN(SQRT( POWER(SIN(RADIANS(latitude - #{lat}) / 2), 2) + COS(RADIANS(#{lat})) * COS(RADIANS(latitude)) * POWER(SIN(RADIANS(longitude - #{lng}) / 2), 2) )) ) <= #{radiusKm} ORDER BY distance_km
